Name: Order of the Clockwork
Description: A clandestine network of scholars, practitioners of a 'religion of science,' bound by a singular, monumental purpose.

Hexad Pillars.name: The Archeologist (The Historian)
Hexad Pillars.description: Based on the legacy of Clary and the Bards' Guild. They hunt relics and ancient data, using the past to predict and prevent the cycles of cataclysm.

Hexad Pillars.name: The Psychologist (The Sociologist)
Hexad Pillars.description: Based on the legacy of Celandine and the Trading House. They manipulate secrets and social currents to maintain mass stability and psychological health.

Hexad Pillars.name: The Cosmologist (The Navigator)
Hexad Pillars.description: Based on the legacy of Hazard and the Wind Talkers' Guild. They study the 'Macro-Forces'—stars, Aetheric winds, and lunar cycles—to map the world's long-term shifts.

Hexad Pillars.name: The Engineer (The Maker)
Hexad Pillars.description: Based on the legacy of Kog and the Artisans' Guild. They repair, build, and regulate technology, ensuring the Technological Balance is never tipped.

Hexad Pillars.name: The Chemist (The Alchemist)
Hexad Pillars.description: Based on the legacy of Pipin and the Chefs' Guild. They manage the biological health of the world through agriculture, medicine, and chemical research.

Hexad Pillars.name: The Moralist (The Captain)
Hexad Pillars.description: Based on the legacy of Jax and the Ferrymen's Guild. They organize the cell and serve as the final anchor of the group's integrity.
